productDisplayName: Nike Men's Air Court Leader Low Black Red Shoe
description: Composition:Black multipurpose training shoe with red swoosh and outsoleShoe care:1. Brush surface with a soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washThese black and red trainers from nike are made for playing on the Basketball court. The upper uses synthetic leathers and mesh that give excellent support and protection while being lightweight at the same time. The phylon midsole provides excellent absorbtion of impact. The herringbone pattern of the outsole provides great grip. Snug Fit coupled with greater mobility make this a great choice of footwear.
